title: Integrity Scanner
subtitle: Validates databases for orphan data, quota drifts, and IAM role conflicts.
rule_quotas_desc: Checks that the number of active companies does not exceed the profile limit.
rule_iam_desc: Detects users without hierarchical attachment or conflicting roles.
rule_modules_desc: Detects remaining access to expired or unauthorized modules.
rule_db_desc: Scan for orphan foreign keys (ON DELETE SET NULL).
empty_subtitle: Launch the scan above to check integrity.
